chapter_context.summary: Paul exhorts the believers to live in holiness and brotherly love. He then provides comfort regarding those who have died, explaining the hope of the resurrection and the return of Christ.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on Living in Sanctification and Holiness (4:1-8), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Thessalonians.

outline.text: Exhortation to Brotherly Love and Diligence
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Exhortation to Brotherly Love and Diligence (4:9-12), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Thessalonians.

outline.text: The Hope of the Resurrection and Christ's Return
outline.explanation: This section focuses on The Hope of the Resurrection and Christ's Return (4:13-18), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Thessalonians.

1.commentary:
### Tyndale Study Notes
**Chapter Overview: 1 Thessalonians 4**
This verse contributes to the central message of 1 Thessalonians, emphasizing the grace and truth revealed in Jesus Christ.
1.full_commentary:
### Matthew Henry Commentary
Matthew Henry offers devotional reflections on the spiritual impact of this passage for the believer.

### Jamieson-Fausset-Brown
JFB analysis explores the historical context and original language nuances of this portion of the New Testament.

devotional.question: How does this passage impact your daily walk with God?

cultural_historical.title: New Testament Context
cultural_historical.text: Written in the 1st century AD to diverse groups of believers across the Roman Empire.
